titleStmt.title: SII 17.724: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 724. (A.R. No. 667 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.
The king of this record who is described as Maduraiyum Pāṇḍiyaṉ-muḍittalaiyum koṇḍaruḷiṉa may be identified with Kulōttuṅga III.

This inscription records the gift of 24 Bhujabala pudumāḍai, left in the hands of the śivabrāhmaṉas (names specified) of the temple, by Śivabhūtaṉ Madiśūdaṉa Vāṉavar Nāyakaṉ of Kōyaṁbēḍu in Māṅgāḍu-nāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam a sub-division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, for burning two perpetual lamps in the temple of Tirumullaivāyil-uḍaiyār in Kāṉappēṟūr-nāḍu in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyum koṇ ṭaruḷiṉa śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 jayaṅkoṇṭaco
ḻa maṇṭalattup puḻaṟ koṭṭattuk kāṉappeṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyiluṭaiyāṟku Immaṇṭalattup puliyūr koṭṭattu māṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭuk koyampe
ṭṭuc civapūtaṉ maticūtaṉa vāṉavar nāyakaṉ cantirātittavarai celvatāka vaitta tirunantā viḷakku Iraṇṭukkum Ikkoyiliṟ kāṇiyuṭaiya civappirāmaṇaril
kāśyapaṉ Āḷumpirāṉāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻapaṭṭaṉeṉum śrīkaṇṭanātaṉāṉa tirucciṟṟam pala paṭṭaṉeṉum kāśyapaṉ caraṇamāṭāṉ paṉmāheśvara paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi
māril ceyya periyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Uḷpaṭṭa Ivvaṉaivomum yivaṉ pakkal kaikkoṇṭa puca palapputumāṭai 2 10 4 Immāṭai Irupattu nālukkum Ittirunaṉtā viḷa
kku Iraṇṭum cantirātittavarai Erippatākac cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭuttom .
Digital edition of SII 17.724 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
